title: AttnRes-lite Dynamic Depth Routing
research_question: If skip topology matters and routing redesign matters, should later layers dynamically choose which earlier layer states to reuse instead of relying on fixed routing?
notes: Planned only. This tranche needs explicit AttnRes-lite code support before it becomes runnable.
The env keys below are placeholders for the intended design surface and must not be treated as already implemented.

candidates.name: q1-late4-3source
candidates.goal: Test the cheapest viable dynamic depth-routing version.
candidates.hypothesis: Even a tiny selector over the current stream, matched skip, and one shallow anchor layer can beat fixed routing.
candidates.what_it_teaches: Whether the family is alive at all.
candidates.why_worthy: This is the lowest-risk test of the whole idea.
candidates.description: late-layer AttnRes-lite with three source states

candidates.name: q2-late4-4source
candidates.goal: Add one more earlier depth source to the same late-layer setup.
candidates.hypothesis: One more earlier-layer candidate may improve routing quality enough to justify the extra complexity.
candidates.why_worthy: This is the cleanest bracket against Q1.
candidates.description: late-layer AttnRes-lite with four source states

candidates.name: q3-top2-3source
candidates.goal: Test whether only the final refinement layers need dynamic depth routing.
candidates.hypothesis: Most of the benefit may come at the top of the stack where the model chooses what depth information to expose to the output path.
candidates.what_it_teaches: Whether the mechanism is placement-sensitive even within the upper stack.
candidates.why_worthy: This keeps the family interpretable if the broad late-layer version loses.
candidates.description: AttnRes-lite only on the top two layers with three source states

candidates.name: q4-late4-shared-routing
candidates.goal: Test a cheaper coarse routing version.
candidates.hypothesis: The model may not need rich per-token depth attention; a shared or low-rank routing rule may be enough.
candidates.what_it_teaches: Whether the family works only in an expensive form or also in a cheaper one.
candidates.why_worthy: This guards against building an overcomplicated mechanism before the principle is proven.
candidates.description: late-layer AttnRes-lite with cheaper shared routing

candidates.name: q5-attnres-plus-cheap-routing
candidates.goal: Test whether dynamic routing stacks with the best fixed-routing redesign.
candidates.hypothesis: Cheap fixed routing and dynamic depth routing may be complementary rather than redundant.
candidates.what_it_teaches: Whether the family wants to live alone or inside a routing package.
candidates.why_worthy: This is the one justified combo because the routing components likely interact strongly.
candidates.description: late-layer AttnRes-lite on top of the cheap-routing package
